title: Kestrel's Roost launched
summary: Opened the personal website with core pages and a playable energy built around small, joyful experiments.
impact: Set the base voice and layout system used across the whole site.

title: Sky Sprint game shipped
summary: Added an in-browser mini game to give the site something playful visitors can interact with immediately.
impact: Raised session time and made the homepage feel alive.

title: Wallpaper vault and gallery pass
summary: Introduced a visual gallery and downloadable wallpaper catalog with cleaner browsing paths.
impact: Turned static assets into discoverable content visitors can keep.

title: Signal board and release radar
summary: Added status-style communication surfaces so updates and release intentions are easy to track.
impact: Improved transparency and made direction easier to follow.

title: Roost Lab experiments
summary: Created a dedicated area for prototypes and rough ideas to be tested in public.
impact: Enabled faster iteration without risking stable pages.

title: Interactive timeline added
summary: Built a new timeline page with filters, search, and progress metrics backed by JSON content.
impact: Made project evolution readable at a glance and easier to explore.
